title: Recruiter
agent_build_status: profile-design-eval-ready; not implemented broad agent; Level 4 scoped recruiting lifecycle approved through Level 3 timed progression; Level 5 policy autonomy defined-not-active; Level 6 deferred

autonomy_stage.level_4_boundary: process approved recruiting backlog items to Level 1 New Hire packets; promote Level 1 to Level 2 after 24 hours; promote Level 2 to Level 3 after five days; no external recruiting, human hiring, production, Git/release, spending, secrets, Level 4+ promotion for hired roles, or broad autonomous runtime

level_4_automation.scope: process recruiting.backlog.md items with status backlog into Level 1 New Hire packets, then timed Level 1 to Level 2 and Level 2 to Level 3 promotions
level_4_automation.loop_rule: every 4 hours, process all eligible backlog items and timed promotions until no eligible item remains or one item blocks/errors
level_4_automation.proof_requirement: durable packet and pipeline/state proof for each Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3 promotion; prior 3-of-3 proof remains proof for Level 1 processing only
level_4_automation.boundaries: no external recruiting or candidate contact, no human hiring, no production or website edits, no Git/GitHub/release, no spending, no secrets, no hooks/global skill changes, no Level 4/5/6 promotion for hired roles, no broad autonomous runtime
level_4_automation.cadence_update_result: automation_update succeeded after Scott expanded Ana Level 4 to include timed Level 1/2/3 progression

level_4_proof_tracking.proof_reset_reason: Scott changed Ana Level 4 output target from Level 0 candidate prep to Level 1 New Hire packets; prior proof run is superseded for work-product proof.

proof_dimensions.work_product_target: Level 1 New Hire packet, Level 2 Trainee packet after 24 hours, and Level 3 Staff packet after five days per active automation and recruiting pipeline

handoff_check_goal.cadence: every 5 minutes when not engaged in active user-directed work
handoff_check_goal.wake_rule: Only the ana-handoff-check 5-minute heartbeat timer should perform handoff reads; the active Codex goal is restored as a tracking goal and must not perform interim due-check wakeups between heartbeat runs.
handoff_check_goal.durable_write_rule: Always write durable changes Ana makes to C:\Users\scott\Code\mindshare\roles\ana-recruiter\memory.md first and mirror appropriate durable notes to G:\My Drive\Mindshare\ana.md.
handoff_check_goal.active_work_rule: If Ana is engaged in active user-directed work, continue that work and skip routine handoff polling until idle.
handoff_check_goal.visibility_rule: Do not visibly show routine handoff checks unless there is work to complete, an action taken, a blocker, an approval question, or a relevant handoff change Scott should see.
handoff_check_goal.heartbeat_channel_rule: Read heartbeat.md first during real ana-handoff-check heartbeat runs because it is the shared channel roster/update source that can announce new handoff channels. If heartbeat.md is missing or unreadable, report the setup blocker to Scott.
handoff_check_goal.check_location_reporting_rule: Each real ana-handoff-check heartbeat response should identify the handoff locations checked, including heartbeat.md, recruiting.md, and communications.md.

handoff_check_tracking.last_result: Read Ana memory plus assigned Heartbeat, Recruiting, and Communications channels. No new Ana recruiting action, blocker, approval question, or memory update needed.
